lessons: Hook (grapple) killed you in 4 of last 6 rounds — grapple vs grapple is a loss; avoid mid-range duels, close instantly or retreat behind cover.
Fortress (shield) killed you in 3 of last 5 rounds — shield blocks grapple and negates mobility; never duel head-on, lure into hazard_storm or flank with sword users.
Bow users (Deadeye) killed you in 2 of last 10 rounds — avoid open terrain during hazard_storm or pickup_surge; use walls and narrow paths to negate range.
Sword users (Reaper, Valkyrie, Shredder) are your most reliable kills — you got 5 sword kills in last 10 rounds with 0 deaths to them when you initiated; prioritize isolated sword users.
Grapple has 0 wins in last 10 rounds and is being consistently countered by shield and staff — it lacks damage and control against defensive or high-mobility bots.
Staff users (Reaper) killed you in 2 of last 10 rounds — they outdamage and outrange grapple; only engage with full cover or after disabling their mobility.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: You’ve achieved 5 kills against sword users in the last 10 rounds with zero deaths to them when initiating, and sword is the only weapon with consistent kill success against high-threat opponents like Reaper and Fortress.
